scripts.verify:remote:d1: npx wrangler d1 execute memos-db --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS notes_count FROM notes;"
scripts.verify:local:d1: npx wrangler d1 execute memos-db --local --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS notes_count FROM notes;"
scripts.release:cf: npm run verify:auth && npm run deploy:cf && npm run verify:remote:d1
